name: Indonesian Brisket of Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the beef brisket for 3 hours.
2. After 2 and a half hours of boiling, combine garlic, bacon, onions, and cooked pinto beans in an oven-safe dish.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for half an hour.
4. Add the boiled brisket to the baking dish along with the remaining ingredients (carrots, hot peppers, tomatoes, celery, corn).
5. Continue baking at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for another half hour.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool before refrigerating.
7. Serve the next day with rice.
